title: Income Tax Return Filing Chennai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Expert income tax return filing in Chennai. Individual, business, company ITR. Salaried, capital gains, NRI returns. Call +91-99622 60333.
bodyText:
Looking for income tax return filing services in Chennai? Virtual Auditor provides expert ITR filing in Chennai, led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA). We handle all return types — ITR-1 to ITR-7 — for individuals, HUFs, firms, LLPs, companies, and trusts.

What is Income Tax Return Filing Chennai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Income tax return preparation and filing for all categories — salaried individuals (ITR-1/ITR-2), professionals and proprietors (ITR-3/ITR-4), partnerships and LLPs (ITR-5), companies (ITR-6), and trusts (ITR-7). Capital gains computation — equity, mutual funds, real estate, unlisted shares with correct indexation and grandfathering. Tax planning advisory — Section 80C/80D/80E deductions, HRA exemption, NPS benefits, and regime comparison (old vs new). Advance tax computation and quarterly payment schedule. Revised return filing for corrections within the time limit. Response to intimation under Section 143(1) and defective return notices. NRI tax return filing with DTAA benefit claims and foreign tax credit.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for ITR Filing in Chennai
  Income tax law has become increasingly complex — capital gains with multiple holding period rules, new tax regime vs old regime comparison, cryptocurrency taxation, and DTAA provisions for NRIs. Filing through a CA ensures correct tax computation, maximum legitimate deductions, and compliance that withstands scrutiny. CA V. Viswanathan brings expertise across all taxpayer categories — salaried professionals with RSU/ESOP income, business owners with Section 44AD/44ADA presumptive taxation, and companies with MAT/AMT computation. Our Spencer Plaza office in Chennai provides in-person consultation.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Document collection — Form 16, bank statements, investment proofs, capital gains statements. Step 2: Income computation with optimal regime selection (old vs new). Step 3: Deduction and exemption optimisation. Step 4: Tax computation and advance tax reconciliation. Step 5: ITR preparation and CA review. Step 6: E-filing and e-verification. Step 7: Post-filing support — intimation response, refund tracking.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need ITR filing in Chennai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-99622 60333
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: G-131, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002
  Individual ITR from Rs 1,500. Business ITR from Rs 5,000.

faqs.q: What is the due date for income tax return filing?
faqs.a: 31 July for individuals and non-audit cases. 31 October for businesses requiring audit. 30 November for transfer pricing cases. Belated returns can be filed until 31 December of the assessment year with a late fee of Rs 5,000.

faqs.q: Should I choose the old or new tax regime?
faqs.a: The choice depends on your deductions and exemptions. If your total deductions (80C, 80D, HRA, home loan) exceed Rs 3-4 lakhs, the old regime may be beneficial. We compute tax under both regimes and recommend the optimal choice.

faqs.q: Do you handle NRI income tax returns from Chennai?
faqs.a: Yes. We file NRI returns with DTAA benefit claims, foreign tax credit computation, NRO/NRE income treatment, and capital gains on Indian property sales. We also handle Section 195 TDS certificates for NRI property transactions.
